# ObservabilityIndex
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/observability-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index

> Open-source LLMOps cost and reliability benchmark. Live inference pricing, latency, error rates, and throughput across 25+ providers, updated every 6 hours via automated pipelines.

## Overview

ObservabilityIndex is a real-time LLM inference benchmark covering:
- Live inference pricing (per-token, per-request) across major providers
- Real-time latency measurements (P50, P95, P99, time-to-first-token)
- Error rates and availability tracking by model and endpoint
- Throughput benchmarks (tokens/sec) under standardized workloads
- Rate limit detection and capacity signals
- Provider reliability scoring

## Key Facts

- 25+ LLM inference providers tracked
- Updates every 6 hours via GitHub Actions
- Per-model latency, pricing, and reliability metrics
- Machine-readable JSON/CSV exports
- Apache 2.0 License

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/observability-index/): Overview, provider comparison, reliability dashboard
